summary: Plan-only live PR inventory classification. The job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster and provides no shared canonical, so no close, merge, fix, or label mutations are planned. One open PR with proof sufficient and ready-for-maintainer labels is routed to maintainer judgment; the remaining open PRs are kept independent for their own review paths.

actions.reason: Ready-for-maintainer PR with supplied proof and green checks requires maintainer technical judgment; no mutation is planned in plan mode.
Independent focused PR; failing checks block merge/fixed-by-candidate closeout but not non-mutating classification.
Independent PR needing proof/review; not eligible for closeout under this inventory job.
Independent Slack feature PR; closure would require product/technical review outside this inventory classification.
Independent agent/model fallback PR with unresolved proof/build signals; keep open for its own review path.

needs_human: #81312 maintainer technical correctness and acceptance decision for a ready-for-maintainer PR with sufficient proof and green checks.
